text: There is one more difference from the Monadical setup.

text: Monadical's pipeline was mainly text-to-skin: describe a character in words, then generate a Minecraft skin target.

text: We borrowed the useful composite target idea, but changed the input side.

text: For most creators, the natural input is already an image: a drawing, a game character, an avatar, or a photo.

text: So our direction is image-to-skin: reference image in, playable Minecraft skin out.

text: To achieve this, we chose Flux2 Klein 4B base as our base model for its strong image understanding and generalization.

text: But a great model is only half the battle. To maximize the training results, we completely redesigned our dataset.
